profile.name: Jyotiradityasinh Chauhan
profile.title: Computer Science Student
profile.bio: CS student at the University of Houston building systems where security, data, and people intersect. Security+ certified with hands-on experience in OT vulnerability management, LLM pipelines, and full-stack development.
bioExtended: I like work that sits at the intersection of real infrastructure and the people who depend on it — from Claroty CTD pipelines at LyondellBasell to GPU-hosted LLM backends serving 100+ users.
Outside the terminal: Agora coffee, Houston at night, basketball courts, and quiet design that lets the details breathe.

experience.title: Cybersecurity Intern
experience.description: SQL-backed vulnerability management pipeline with Claroty CTD integration and CVSS v3.1 environmental recast engine for OT assets.
highlights: Python poller for near real-time delta ingestion
Four-table relational schema feeding BI dashboard

experience.description: Full-stack LLM web app integrated into Canvas LMS via FastAPI with GPU-hosted inference pipeline.

highlights: Complex data transformation across large datasets
